messages.content: 翻译精简英文， “目前，所使用的救援钩是一种木质棍子，用于救援电击的人或导致电击的物品。然而，这种工具没有钩子，不能有效地移动被电击的人或物品，因此缺乏专业性。此外，该工具也没有明确的信息规格，缺乏标准化管理,而且木作为一种绝缘材料，能够一定程度上承受电压，可是承受电压的能力取决于木材中水分的含量，由于无法确切了解木材的抗压能力，不建议将木材作为承受高电压的救援工具”

Currently, the rescue hook used is a wooden stick which is used to rescue people who have been electrocuted or remove objects causing the electrocution. However, this tool lacks professionalism as it lacks a hook and cannot effectively move the electrocuted person or object. Additionally, the tool lacks clear information specifications and standardized management. While wood as an insulating material can withstand voltage to a certain extent, its ability to withstand voltage depends on the moisture content of the wood. As the compression resistance ability of wood cannot be accurately determined, it is not recommended to use wood as a rescue tool for high-voltage situations.
翻译英文 “由于木作为一种绝缘材料，能够一定程度上承受电压，可是承受电压的能力取决于木材中水分的含量，由于无法确切了解木材的抗压能力，不建议将木材作为承受高电压的救援工具”

As wood is an insulating material, it can withstand voltage to a certain extent. However, its ability to withstand voltage depends on the moisture content of the wood. As it is impossible to accurately determine the compression resistance ability of wood, it is not recommended to use wood as a rescue tool for high-voltage situations.
翻译英文 “由于木作为一种绝缘材料，能够一定程度上承受电压，可是承受电压的能力取决于木材中水分的含量，由于无法确切了解木材的承受电压能力，不建议将木材作为承受高电压的救援工具”

As wood is an insulating material, it can withstand voltage to a certain extent. However, its ability to withstand voltage depends on the moisture content of the wood. As it is impossible to accurately determine the ability of wood to withstand voltage, it is not recommended to use wood as a rescue tool for high-voltage situations.

翻译精简英文 “As wood is an insulating material, it can withstand voltage to a certain extent. However, its ability to withstand voltage depends on the moisture content of the wood. As it is impossible to accurately determine the ability of wood to withstand voltage, it is not recommended to use wood as a rescue tool for high-voltage situations.”

Wood can withstand voltage to some extent as an insulating material. However, its voltage resistance capability depends on moisture content, which cannot be accurately determined. Therefore, it is not recommended to use wood as a rescue tool in high-voltage scenarios.
翻译专业英文 rescue hook is a wooden stick used in production. However, It is without a hook to move the person who has been electrocuted or the item that is causing the shock.
救援钩是生产中使用的一种木制棍棒。然而，它没有勾子可以移动被电击的人或导致电击的物品。
翻译专业英文 ”rescue hook is a wooden stick used in production. However, It is without a hook to move the person who has been electrocuted or the item that is causing the shock.“

The rescue hook is a wooden stick utilized in a manufacturing setting, but its lack of a hook impedes the ability to move a person or object that has been electrocuted or is the source of an electrical shock.

翻译精简一点 The rescue hook is a wooden stick utilized in a manufacturing setting, but its lack of a hook impedes the ability to move a person or object that has been electrocuted or is the source of an electrical shock.
The rescue hook used in manufacturing is a wooden stick without a hook, which makes it difficult to move electrocuted people or objects causing electrical shocks.
翻译专业 The rescue hook used in manufacturing is a wooden stick without a hook, which makes it difficult to move electrocuted people or objects causing electrical shocks.

The rescue hook that is used in a manufacturing setting is essentially a wooden stick that lacks a hook, and thus, it poses difficulties when it comes to moving people or objects that have been electrocuted or that are causing electrical shocks.
翻译专业英文一点 ”rescue hook is a wooden stick used in production. However, It is without a hook to move the person who has been electrocuted or the item that is causing the shock.“

The rescue hook, which is utilized in production, is essentially a wooden stick that lacks a hook. Consequently, it becomes difficult to move people or objects that have been electrocuted or cause electrical shock.
